effect: [Main] You may trash 1 card with a [Trigger] from your hand: Negate the effect of up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 8 or less during this turn.
name: Black Hole
trigger: [Trigger] Add up to 1 {Blackbeard Pirates} type card from your trash to your hand.
types: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
